name: Butterscotch Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add the brown sugar, egg, nuts, and vanilla to the melted butter.
3. Mix the dry ingredients (flour, salt, and baking powder) together and sift them over the wet mixture.
4. Combine all the ingredients until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into a shallow, greased pan.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and cool on a wire rack.
